$comment: Vercel Hobby plan limits cron to 1/day. For 5-min intervals, use an external cron service (e.g. cron-job.org, UptimeRobot) pointing to POST /api/oracle/cron with header 'authorization: Bearer $CRON_SECRET'. The oracle code already supports 5-min granularity — see scripts/oracle-cron.ts for local dev.
